metadata.title: Weather Basics
metadata.source_description: Supplemental A1 vocab selected from coverage gaps

item.notes: Coverage gap: weather. High-utility season word used constantly with weather descriptions.
item.image_prompt: Polished digital illustration of autumn in Korea with colorful leaves in a contemporary neighborhood park path, Korean adults walking naturally, crisp air feeling, no text.

image.prompt: Polished digital illustration of autumn in Korea with colorful leaves in a contemporary neighborhood park path, Korean adults walking naturally, crisp air feeling, no text. Stylish, contemporary editorial illustration for an adult language learner in their 30s. Keep it warm, playful, and visually engaging without looking childish. Use clean composition, rich color, and a polished modern textbook feel. If the scene includes people, depict Korean people in a natural contemporary Korean setting. No text in the image.

cards.back_html:
autumn
가을
ga-eul

Examples

  • 가을은 선선해요.
    Autumn is pleasantly cool.
Coverage gap: weather. High-utility season word used constantly with weather descriptions.
Source: New vocab proposal • coverage-gap • weather

autumn

  • 가을은 선선해요.
    Autumn is pleasantly cool.
Coverage gap: weather. High-utility season word used constantly with weather descriptions.
